texto: As a doctor, when I was minister of health and would go somewhere, little girls would come up to me and say, 'I want to be like you one day, I want to be a doctor.' Now, they tell me, 'I want to be president just like you.' All of us can dream as big as we want.

texto: My father respected and admired my mother and was a person who was always standing by my side, encouraging me to do more and believed in my capacity.
